name: claude-semaforo
description: Semaforo visivo per lo stato di Claude Code

commands.title: Claude Status: Set up Claude Code hooks (this machine)

enumDescriptions: Always notify, even when the VSCode window is focused
Only when the VSCode window is not in the foreground
claudeSemaforo.notifications.when.markdownDescription: When to show a desktop notification on status change.

claudeSemaforo.notifications.sound.markdownDescription: Play a sound with the notification.

claudeSemaforo.notifications.states.markdownDescription: Which status changes trigger a notification.

claudeSemaforo.staleWorkingTimeoutSecond.markdownDescription: Safety net for interruptions: Claude Code emits no hook when you interrupt (Esc), so the light would stay 🔴 forever. If the status stays **working** for this many seconds without any update **and no tool is running**, it's treated as finished (🟢). A running tool (e.g. a long build) still stays 🔴. Set to `0` to disable.

claudeSemaforo.sessionTimeoutMinutes.markdownDescription: Multi-session cleanup: a session whose state hasn't updated for this many minutes is treated as dead (e.g. Claude crashed without a `SessionEnd`) and dropped from the traffic light. Set to `0` to never drop.
